						ADD COLUMN parent_id INT REFERENCES alter_column_fk_parent_private(id);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN REFERENCES requires REFERENCES on referenced column

						ADD COLUMN parent_id INT REFERENCES alter_column_fk_scope_parent_private(id);

assertions.scriptName: public schema CREATE requires explicit grant
assertions.query: CREATE TABLE public_schema_default_private (id INT PRIMARY KEY);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE AGGREGATE requires schema CREATE privilege
CREATE OPERATOR requires schema CREATE privilege
CREATE OPERATOR requires EXECUTE on backing function
CREATE OPERATOR uses qualified schema
CREATE OPERATOR uses qualified schema
assertions.query:
SELECT n.nspname, o.oprname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_operator o
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = o.oprnamespace
						WHERE o.oprname IN ('===', 'operator_private.===')
						ORDER BY n.nspname, o.oprname;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE CAST requires source or target type ownership
assertions.query:
CREATE CAST (INT AS cast_private_color)
						WITH FUNCTION int_to_cast_private_color(INT);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE CAST requires EXECUTE on backing function
assertions.query:
CREATE CAST (INT AS cast_execute_color)
						WITH FUNCTION int_to_cast_execute_color(INT);

assertions.scriptName: DROP CAST requires source or target type ownership
assertions.query: DROP CAST (INT AS drop_cast_private_color);

assertions.scriptName: DROP CAST requires source or target type ownership
assertions.query: SELECT ((1)::drop_cast_private_color)::text;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION requires schema CREATE privilege
assertions.query: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION unauthorized_ts_config (COPY = pg_catalog.simple);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION uses qualified schema
assertions.query:
CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION ts_config_private.qualified_ts_config
						(COPY = pg_catalog.simple);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION uses qualified schema
assertions.query:
SELECT n.nspname, c.cfgname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_ts_config c
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.cfgnamespace
						WHERE c.cfgname = 'qualified_ts_config'
						ORDER BY n.nspname;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION requires elevated privilege
assertions.query:
CREATE SUBSCRIPTION subscription_created
						CONNECTION 'host=127.0.0.1 dbname=postgres'
						PUBLICATION subscription_pub
						WITH (connect = false, enabled = false, create_slot = false, slot_name = NONE);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION records creating owner
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION OWNER TO updates pg_subscription owner
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION OWNER TO rejects missing roles
assertions.query:
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_missing_owner
						OWNER TO missing_subscription_owner;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION OWNER TO rejects missing roles
ALTER SUBSCRIPTION requires subscription ownership
assertions.query: ALTER SUBSCRIPTION subscription_alter_sub RENAME TO subscription_alter_renamed_sub;

assertions.scriptName: DROP SUBSCRIPTION requires subscription ownership
assertions.query: DROP SUBSCRIPTION subscription_drop_sub;
